offer: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing statements cause cash flow gaps. We convert legal time sheets into formatted billing statements instead of manual formatting of billing statements.
problem: Inaccurate billing statements from manual time sheet entries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm accountants
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on billing solutions
DM outreach to law firm accountants with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accountants
try_it: Let users try manual entry of time sheets and templates
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used templates for easy access
Set default reminders for billing tasks
Allow CSV imports for existing time data
Streamline onboarding process for new users
